title: Terraformed Api Reforged
description: Port of Terraformermc's Terraform api to forge
body:
This is just mainly an api used for terrestria reforged and cinderscapes reforged, but other mods are also welcome to use it. You can find out more info on github.

**Note: This is in no way related to the Terraformers team or any of their members. Please bring any issues that you encounter with this to MY github, NOT THEIRS.**
